concerns: No body or context beyond metadata; the purpose of the link is not explained in the file itself.
The semantics of board://item-47e87779 are not defined locally.
notes: A bare attachment metadata stub that records a provider-registry channel link to board item item-47e87779, added at 2026-06-22T15:38:08Z.

intention_signals: It appears intended to register a cross-reference between a provider-registry channel memory entry and a specific board item, likely so the channel can surface or track board-related items.
